雙8pin供電極限375W。

有無教學？

replies.msg:
1. 喺https://www.igorslab.de/en/red-bios-editor-and-morepowertool-adjust-and-optimize-your-vbios-and-even-more-stable-overclocking-navi-unlimited/3/ Download Morepowertool 1.3.3.
2. 跟住用GPU-Z save 低current bios.

3. 開MPT，Then select your display card.

4. 之後就load翻喺GPU-Z save 低嘅bios

5. 喺power & voltage set 翻 power limit gpu value, then click write SPPT. Restart your PC and then you're good to go.
